title: <div>I don’t think you respect me or my time. I don’t receive any warmth or affe
content: I don’t think you respect me or my time. I don’t receive any warmth or affection from you. I can’t comprehend how I am benefiting from this relationship. I can’t endlessly give and consider you without the same in return. I’m on empty, which turns me mean and cold, which is not who I like to be.
context: From document: I don’t think you respect me or my time. I don’t receive any warmth…
